ordinary_no_progress_guard.fingerprint: ordinary|explored the repo. it’s an early python/numpy em solver scaffold: fdtd core, partial cpml, pcb patch geometry, and gaussian port excitation. no todo/fixme markers were present. tests/docs/examples/results are empty, and the readme-documented `em_solver/run_patch_sim.py` entry point was missing. changed: - added [run_patch_sim.py](/home/whqkrel/rfverificationtool/em_solver/run_patch_sim.py): builds the 2.4 ghz patch simulation, attaches cpml and port excitation, runs fdtd, and writes `results/patch_s11.csv` plus png plot when matplotlib is available. - updated [excitation.py](/home/whqkrel/rfverificationtool/em_solver/excitation.py): feed excitation now starts above the ground plane and records incident voltage with the same units as measured port voltage. verified with the documented venv: - `python -m py_compile em_solver/fdtd_core.py em_solver/geometry.py em_solver/cpml.py em_solver/excitation.py em_solver/run_patch_sim.py` - `python em_solver/run_patch_sim.py --steps 5 --quiet --points 5 --output-dir results/_tmp_smoke` - `python -m em_solver.run_patch_sim --steps 5 --quiet --points 5 --output-dir results/_tmp_module_smoke` temporary smoke outputs were removed. remaining known gap: readme still lists `subgrid.py`, but nothing currently calls it, so i did not invent that feature without a stronger in-code anchor.

ordinary|**결론** codex가 linux repo를 전혀 못 보는 것은 아닙니다. 문제의 핵심은 현재 codex shell 표면이 **wsl shell이 아니라 windows powershell 5.1**이고, powershell/cmd에서 `\\wsl.localhost\ubuntu-24.04\home\whqkrel\rfverificationtool` unc 경로 접근이 `access is denied`로 막힌다는 점입니다. 그 결과 상대경로 `.`는 repo가 아니라 `c:\windows\system32\windowspowershell\v1.0`를 봅니다. **ranked synthesis** | rank | explanation | confidence | basis | |---|---|---:|---| | 1 | 현재 shell이 windows powershell이고 wsl unc cwd를 제대로 사용하지 못함 | high | `$pwd`, `get-location`, `cmd /c cd` 모두 system32를 가리킴 | | 2 | windows 쪽 unc wsl path 접근이 권한/샌드박스 경계에서 막힘 | high | `get-item`, `get-childitem`, `cmd dir \\wsl.localhost...` 모두 `access is denied` | | 3 | wsl/linux 내부 repo 권한 문제는 아님 | high | `wsl.exe -d ubuntu-24.04 -- ls/stat/test -w /home/whqkrel/rfverificationtool` 성공 | | 4 | `bash`가 wsl bash가 아니라 git bash로 resolve되어 혼동/실패 가능 | medium-high | `bash.exe`는 `c:\program files\git\usr\bin\bash.exe`, 실행 시 win32 error 5 | **evidence** - current shell: powershell `5.1.26100.8457`, desktop edition. - powershell process cwd string은 unc였지만 실제 provider location은 `c:\windows\system32\windowspowershell\v1.0`. - `get-childitem .`가 repo 파일이 아니라 powershell 설치 디렉터리를 listing함. - `\\wsl.localhost\ubuntu-24.04\home\whqkrel\rfverificationtool`에 대해 powershell/cmd 직접 접근은 `access is denied`. - wsl 자체는 정상: ubuntu-24.04 wsl2가 running이고, `/home/whqkrel/rfverificationtool`은 `whqkrel:whqkrel`, mode `0755`, read/write/execute 가능. - `wsl.exe -d ubuntu-24.04 --cd /home/whqkrel/rfverificationtool -- git status --short`도 성공함. **inference** codex가 “linux에 접근 못하는” 것처럼 보이는 직접 원인은 linux 권한이 아니라 **windows powershell 기반 실행 환경과 wsl unc 경로 접근 실패**입니다. 현재 세션에서는 상대경로 명령이나 `bash` 명령을 믿으면 안 되고, wsl repo 작업은 다음 형태로 명시해야 정상 동작합니다: ```powershell wsl.exe -d ubuntu-24.04 --cd /home/whqkrel/rfverificationtool -- <command> ``` 예: `git status`, `ls`, `python3 ...` 등은 이 방식으로 repo를 봅니다. **limits** 쓰기 파일 생성 테스트는 하지 않았습니다. 다만 wsl 내부 `test -w /home/whqkrel/rfverificationtool`는 성공했고, windows unc 직접 접근은 읽기부터 막혔습니다. pytest는 설치되어 있지 않아 `/usr/bin/python3: no module named pytest`가 나왔지만, 이는 linux 접근 문제와는 별개입니다.

ordinary|**결론** codex가 linux 파일을 “못 보는” 게 아니라, 현재 codex 런타임이 **windows 기반 powershell/node.js 프로세스**이고, 그 프로세스가 wsl의 unc 경로인 `\\wsl.localhost\ubuntu-24.04\...` / `\\wsl$\ubuntu-24.04\...`를 windows 파일 api로 열 때 거부되고 있습니다. **ranked synthesis** | rank | explanation | confidence | basis | |---|---|---:|---| | 1 | windows-side codex runtime cannot access the wsl unc provider/path, so node `fs` and powershell fail before reaching linux files | high | powershell/`cmd` return `access is denied`; node `fs.statsync`/`readdirsync` return `eperm` | | 2 | wsl itself and the repo are fine; access works through `wsl.exe` inside the distro | high | `wsl.exe -l -v` shows `ubuntu-24.04 running`; `wsl.exe -d ubuntu-24.04 -- git -c /home/whqkrel/rfverificationtool rev-parse --show-toplevel` succeeds | | 3 | linux filesystem permissions may contribute only if unc maps to a non-owner identity | low/medium | `/home/whqkrel` is `750`, but access fails even at `\\wsl.localhost\ubuntu-24.04`, so this is unlikely to be the primary cause | **evidence** - powershell started from `c:\windows\system32\windowspowershell\v1.0` instead of the requested wsl unc working directory. - `test-path` / `get-childitem` on `\\wsl.localhost\ubuntu-24.04\home\whqkrel\rfverificationtool` returned `access is denied`. - `cmd.exe /c dir "\\wsl.localhost\ubuntu-24.04\home\whqkrel\rfverificationtool"` returned `access is denied`. - node repl reports windows temp path `c:\users\whqkr\appdata\local\temp`, and node `fs` returns: - `eperm: operation not permitted, stat '\\wsl.localhost\ubuntu-24.04\home\whqkrel\rfverificationtool'` - `eperm: operation not permitted, scandir ...` - `wsl.exe -d ubuntu-24.04 -- ls -la /home/whqkrel/rfverificationtool` succeeds. **root cause** the active codex process is not running inside wsl. it is a windows-hosted runtime trying to treat a wsl path as a windows unc network path. in this session, that unc bridge is unavailable or denied to the windows process, even though wsl itself can read the files internally. the practical distinction is: ```text fails: windows node/powershell -> \\wsl.localhost\ubuntu-24.04\home\... works: windows process -> wsl.exe -d ubuntu-24.04 -> /home/whqkrel/rfverificationtool ``` so the shortest accurate diagnosis is: **codex’s windows node.js runtime cannot access the wsl unc filesystem provider; linux access works only through the wsl execution bridge, not through direct windows `fs` access to `\\wsl...` in this session.**

ordinary|**root cause** codex is running as a windows node.js process, but the repo is inside wsl’s linux filesystem: `\\wsl.localhost\ubuntu-24.04\home\whqkrel\rfverificationtool` that unc path is a wsl network provider path, not a normal windows directory. in this session, windows failed before the shell command even started: `createprocessasuserw failed: 267` a direct windows-side probe also returns `access is denied` for both `\\wsl.localhost\...` and `\\wsl$\...`. so this is not a linux permission issue in the repo. it is a host/filesystem mismatch: windows codex cannot reliably launch tools or apply its sandbox over the wsl unc filesystem. this session is also read-only, so writes are impossible here even after path access is fixed. **fix: run codex inside wsl** open windows terminal, enter the distro, and start codex from the linux path: ```powershell wsl -d ubuntu-24.04 ``` then inside ubuntu: ```bash cd /home/whqkrel/rfverificationtool pwd ls -la ``` install/run codex from the wsl environment, not the windows global install: ```bash node -v || sudo apt update node -v || sudo apt install -y nodejs npm npm install -g @openai/codex codex login codex --sandbox workspace-write ``` validation inside the new codex session should show: ```bash pwd # /home/whqkrel/rfverificationtool touch .codex-write-test rm .codex-write-test ``` do not reopen the project as `\\wsl.localhost\...` from the windows codex process. if you must use windows codex, move or clone the repo onto a normal windows path such as: `c:\users\whqkr\projects\rfverificationtool` for this linux/wsl project, the correct fix is to align the runtime with the filesystem: linux codex process, linux project path.
